titleStmt.title: SII 11.160: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 160. (A.R. No. 466 of 1926.) NIGADI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE KALAMĒŚVARA TEMPLE ON THE TANK BUND.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Permāḍidēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated the cyclic year Madhyama-Nandana, Vaiśākha, ba. Śivarātri, Monday. The date appears to be irregular. Ba. 14 of Vaiśākha in the year Nandana began on Friday, 26th April, 1112 A.D. In Khara (= Śaka 1033) however, the date regularly corresponds to Monday, 8th May, 1111 A.D. The record registers a grant of land and a maṭha made to Tējōrāśi-Paṇḍita by Chāvuṇḍa-Gāvuṇḍa of Nigunde while Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Gūvaladēva of the Kadaṁba dynasty was governing the Koṅkaṇa-maṇḍaḷa from his capital Gōve. Nigunde (modern Nigadi in the Dharwar Taluk) is stated to have been situated in Mugunda Thirty, a subdivision (kaṁpaṇa) of Mārajavāḍi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ namaḥśivāyā namastuṁgassiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya
nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhayē bhuvi . kriyāsaktipaṁḍita
ra sisya tējōrāsipaṇḍitargge Ā gaddeya horeya hakkalu .
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara banavāsipu
ravarēsvara samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamāna haradharaṇīprasū
tatriḷōcanakadaṁbavaṁsamahōdaya mahīdharēṁdrasikharābhyu
dayamānamahāpracaṁḍarmārttaṇḍakarātitībranijapratāpa
vāsīkritasakaḷamahīmaṁḍaḷa pracaṁḍamaṁḍaḷikamadavēdaṇḍagaṇḍasthaḷa
khaṇḍanapaṭiṣṭaniṣṭhurabhujadaṇḍa pagemuṭṭegaṇḍa nanūnadānavārisantarppi
tasakaḷavibdhajanasasya nuttuṁgasiṁhalāṁchana vānaramahādhvaja permaṭṭi
tūryyanirgghōśaṇa caturasītinagarādhiṣṭita naṣṭādasāsvamēdhadīkṣādī
kṣitakuḷa(na)prasūta himāvadugirīṁdraruṁdraśikharasthāpitama
hāśaktiprabhāva vairībhakaṇṭhīrava haradiparasūrāma nissaṁkarāma
vidvatsarōjinīrājahaṁsa sarasvatīkarṇnapataṁsa tyāgajhagajhaṁpijhaṁpa
ḷācāryya subhaṭakanakasēkasōpaḷa saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara ma(ṁ)ṇḍa
ḷikatriṇētra lōkaikakaḷpadruma saṁkrāṁtidhavaḷa mūrttinārāyaṇa
kīrttimārttaṇḍa maṁḍaḷikalalāṭapaṭṭa vairigharaṭṭa subhaṭarājasikhāmaṇi
kadaṁbacūḍāmaṇītyakiḷarājāvaḷīvirājitamappa śrīmanmahāma
ṇḍaḷēsvara gūvaladēvaṁ nijarājadhāni gōveyoḷirddu koṁkaṇamaṇḍaḷamaṁ duṣṭa
nigraha visriṣṭa pratipāḷaneyiṁduttarōttarābhivṛddhi rājyaṁgeyu
ttire svasti cāḷukyakulada permmāḍidēvaṁ prithvīrājyaṁ geyuttire . madhyamanaṁdana
saṁvaccarada vaisākha kriṣṇapakṣa sivarātre sōmavāradoḷu mārajavāḍināḍa
kaṁpaṇa muguṁda mūvattaṟa baḷiya bāḍa niguṁdeya dāyimaseṭṭi ya
ḷiya nannagāuṇḍaṁ nannagāuṇḍa naḷiyaṁ cāuṇḍagāuṇḍa nigundeya mūlasthānu dēvaru
bhinnavāda kāla hiriyakeṟeya nīrottina keyyu Eraḍu koḷanu maṭhavu
tējōrāsipaṁḍitargge dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi kālaṁkarcci koṭṭa dharmma sarvvā
bādhe parihāravāgi tamma biṭṭa dharmmamaṁ salisuvaru . svadattaṁ pa
radattaṁ vā yō harati vasundharā . saṣṭirvarśasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 11.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
